texto: The hooting of the owl with its tender wing is more familiar to me than the crowing of the cock. I prefer the strings to the woodwinds. Intermission: that is the darkness. The light feels like a vague scratching
autor: it is malaise rather than pain. I am glad to sink back into darkness.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it is malaise rather than pain. I am glad to sink back into darkness.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “The hooting of the owl with its tender wing is more familiar to me than the crowing of the cock. …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, ernst-junger, eumeswil pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao-noturna.
